caFile.title: CA file
caFile.description: Verify certificates of HTTPS-enabled servers using this CA bundle

cascade.title: Cascade
cascade.description: Selects the deletion cascading strategy for the dependents

certFile.title: Certificate file
certFile.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL certificate file

chart.title: Chart
chart.description: A chart archive. This can be a chart reference, a path to a packaged chart, a path to an unpacked chart directory or a URL

chartVersion.title: Chart version
chartVersion.description: Specify the exact chart version to install

commandLineValues.title: Command line values
commandLineValues.description: Set values on the command line. Can separate values with commas: key1=val1,key2=val2

createNamespace.title: Create namespace
createNamespace.description: Create the release namespace if not present

dependencyUpdate.title: Dependency update
dependencyUpdate.description: Update dependencies if they are missing before installing the chart

description.title: Description
description.description: Add a custom description to the release

devel.title: Development versions
devel.description: Use development versions, too (equivalent to version >0.0.0-0). If version is set, this is ignored

disableOpenapiValidation.title: Disable OpenAPI validation
disableOpenapiValidation.description: If set, the installation process will not validate rendered templates against the Kubernetes OpenAPI Schema

enableDns.title: Enable DNS
enableDns.description: Enable DNS lookups when rendering templates

fileValues.title: File values
fileValues.description: Set values from respective files. Can separate values with commas: key1=path1,key2=path2

generateFlag.title: Generate name
generateFlag.description: Generate the release name (omit the NAME parameter)

hideNotes.title: Hide notes
hideNotes.description: If set, do not show notes in install output. Does not affect presence in chart metadata

inCluster.title: In cluster
inCluster.description: If true, the Helm connector will use a ServiceAccount to connect to the Kubernetes cluster. This is useful when StreamFlow runs directly inside a Kubernetes Pod

insecureSkipTLSVerify.title: Insecure skip TLS verify
insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Skip TLS certificate checks for the chart download

keepHistory.title: Keep history
keepHistory.description: Remove all associated resources and mark the release as deleted, but retain the release history

keyFile.title: Key file
keyFile.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL key file

keyring.title: Key ring
keyring.description: Location of public keys used for verification

kubeApiserver.title: Kubernetes API server
kubeApiserver.description: The address and the port for the Kubernetes API server

kubeAsGroup.title: Impersonate groups
kubeAsGroup.description: Groups to impersonate for the operation

kubeAsUser.title: Impersonate user
kubeAsUser.description: Username to impersonate for the operation

kubeCaFile.title: Kubernetes CA file
kubeCaFile.description: The certificate authority file for the Kubernetes API server connection

kubeContext.title: Kubernetes context
kubeContext.description: Name of the kubeconfig context to use

kubeconfig.title: Kubernetes config
kubeconfig.description: Absolute path of the kubeconfig file to be used

kubeInsecureSkipTLSVerify.title: Kubernetes insecure skip TLS verify
kubeInsecureSkipTLSVerify.description: If true, the Kubernetes API server's server certificate will not be checked for validity. This will make your Kubernetes cluster insecure

kubeTLSServerName.title: Kubernetes TLS server name
kubeTLSServerName.description: Server name to use for Kubernetes API server certificate validation. If it is not provided, the hostname used to contact the server is used

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Labels to add to release metadata, divided by comma: key1=val1,key2=val2

maxConcurrentConnections.title: Max concurrent connections
maxConcurrentConnections.description: Maximum number of concurrent connections to open for a single Kubernetes client

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace to install the release into

nameTemplate.title: Name template
nameTemplate.description: Specify template used to name the release

noHooks.title: No hooks
noHooks.description: Prevent hooks from running during install

output.title: Output
output.description: Print the output in the specified format

password.title: Password
password.description: Chart repository password where to locate the requested chart

plainHttp.title: Plain HTTP
plainHttp.description: Use insecure HTTP connections for the chart download

postRendererArgs.title: Post renderer args
postRendererArgs.description: Arguments to pass to the post-renderer (can specify multiple)

queriesPerSecond.title: Queries per second
queriesPerSecond.description: Queries per second used when communicating with the Kubernetes API, not including bursting

registryConfig.title: Registry config
registryConfig.description: Path to the registry config file

repositoryCache.title: Repository cache
repositoryCache.description: Path to the file containing cached repository indexes

repositoryConfig.title: Repository config
repositoryConfig.description: Path to the file containing repository names and URLs

releaseName.title: Release name
releaseName.description: The release name. If unspecified, it will autogenerate one for you

renderSubchartNotes.title: Render subchart notes
renderSubchartNotes.description: Render subchart notes along with the parent

replace.title: Replace
replace.description: Reuse the given name, only if that name is a deleted release which remains in the history. This is unsafe in production

repo.title: Repository
repo.description: Chart repository url where to locate the requested chart

locationsCacheTTL.title: Locations cache TTL
locationsCacheTTL.description: Available locations cache TTL (in seconds). When such cache expires, the connector performs a new request to check locations availability

resourcesCacheTTL.title: Resources cache TTL
resourcesCacheTTL.description: (**Deprecated.** Use locationsCacheTTL.) Available resources cache TTL (in seconds). When such cache expires, the connector performs a new request to check resources availability

rollbackOnFailure.title: Rollback on failure
rollbackOnFailure.description: If set, Helm will rollback (uninstall) the installation upon failure

setJson.title: Set JSON values
setJson.description: Set JSON values on the command line (can specify multiple or separate values with commas: key1=jsonval1,key2=jsonval2)

setLiteral.title: Set literal values
setLiteral.description: Set a literal STRING value on the command line (can specify multiple)

skipCrds.title: Skip CRDs
skipCrds.description: If set, no CRDs will be installed

skipSchemaValidation.title: Skip schema validation
skipSchemaValidation.description: If set, disables JSON schema validation

stringValues.title: String values
stringValues.description: Set string values. Can separate values with commas: key1=val1,key2=val2

takeOwnership.title: Take ownership
takeOwnership.description: If set, install will ignore the check for helm annotations and take ownership of the existing resources

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Time to wait for any individual Kubernetes operation

transferBufferSize.title: Transfer buffer size
transferBufferSize.description: Buffer size allocated for local and remote data transfers

username.title: Username
username.description: Chart repository username where to locate the requested chart

yamlValues.title: YAML values
yamlValues.description: Specify values in a list of YAML files and/or URLs

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: Verify the package before installing it

waitForJobs.title: Wait for jobs
waitForJobs.description: If set and --wait is enabled, will wait until all Jobs have been completed before marking the release as successful. It will wait for as long as timeout
